name: Solid Snake
ability_description: A handheld device that acts as a radar, similar to the one used in the original Metal Gear Solid.

name: Rauora
ability_description: A launcher that deploys bulletproof panels in doorways to control movement and block lines of sight.

name: Striker
ability_description: Can equip a combination of utility gadgets to adapt to the situation and support the team.

name: Deimos
ability_description: A tracking device that marks a defender and reveals both their position and Deimos’s position while active.

name: Ram
ability_description: A remote-controlled breaching drone that destroys attacker obstacles and soft surfaces while creating cover with deployable shields.

name: Brava
ability_description: A hacking drone that can take control of defender gadgets or destroy them if they cannot be hacked.

name: Grim
ability_description: Launches canisters that release robotic bees, revealing and tracking defenders inside the swarm.

name: Sens
ability_description: Throws a rolling device that deploys a moving light screen to block lines of sight while still allowing physical objects to pass through.

name: Osa
ability_description: A transparent, deployable shield that Osa can carry and place to create safe angles and protect her team while advancing.

name: Flores
ability_description: A remote-controlled explosive drone that can attach to surfaces and detonate on command.

name: Zero
ability_description: A launcher that fires cameras which can pierce surfaces and provide intel from both sides.

name: Ace
ability_description: A throwable breaching device that attaches to surfaces and creates multiple explosive charges for hard breaching.

name: Iana
ability_description: A holographic clone used to create distractions and gather information by drawing enemy attention.

name: Kali
ability_description: An under-barrel explosive lance that destroys defender gadgets and creates holes in surfaces.

name: Amaru
ability_description: A grappling hook that lets Amaru quickly access windows, hatches, and ledges to create aggressive entry routes.

name: Nøkk
ability_description: A stealth gadget that reduces her visibility to cameras and some defender intel tools while active.

name: Gridlock
ability_description: Deploys motorized spikes that expand on the ground to deny area, slow movement, and punish rotations.

name: Maverick
ability_description: A torch that silently burns through reinforced surfaces and utility to create precise openings.

name: Lion
ability_description: A drone-based scan that reveals moving defenders during a short detection window.

name: Finka
ability_description: Temporarily boosts the team’s health, recoil control, and revive speed.

name: Dokkaebi
ability_description: A phone-hacking device that rings defender phones and can take control of cameras.

name: Zofia
ability_description: A launcher that fires concussion and impact grenades for utility destruction and crowd control.

name: Ying
ability_description: A throwable cluster charge that deploys flash charges to disorient defenders and support site execution.

name: Jackal
ability_description: A tracking visor that scans footprints to locate defenders and follow their movement trails.

name: Hibana
ability_description: Fires pellets that can create ranged openings in reinforced walls and hatches.

name: Capitão
ability_description: A crossbow that fires asphyxiating and smoke bolts to control space and support pushes.

name: Blackbeard
ability_description: A weapon-mounted shield that protects Blackbeard's head and upper torso while aiming.

name: Buck
ability_description: A shotgun underbarrel attachment that lets Buck open soft surfaces and create vertical pressure.

name: Sledge
ability_description: A sledgehammer that destroys soft surfaces and opens lines of sight through walls, floors, and barricades.

name: Thatcher
ability_description: A precision device that detects and disables active electronics through walls and other obstacles.

name: Thermite
ability_description: A hard-breaching charge that opens reinforced walls and hatches.

name: Montagne
ability_description: A deployable ballistic shield that provides heavy frontal protection and can be extended for full-body cover.

name: Twitch
ability_description: A shock drone that fires electric darts to disable defender gadgets and provide intel.

name: Blitz
ability_description: A ballistic shield with flash charges that can blind defenders at close range.

name: IQ
ability_description: A scanner that detects electronic devices through surfaces.

name: Fuze
ability_description: A cluster charge that launches explosive sub-grenades through breakable surfaces to clear utility and defenders.

name: Glaz
ability_description: A thermal flip sight that highlights enemies through smoke and improves long-range precision.

name: Denari
ability_description: Throwable devices that create laser networks between each other to slow and injure attackers who cross them.

name: Skopós
ability_description: Two linked humanoid shells that Skopós can swap between, using one as an active operator and the other as a protected observation point.

name: Sentry
ability_description: Can equip two defensive secondary gadgets, allowing highly flexible setups for area control and utility combinations.

name: Tubarão
ability_description: A throwable cryogenic canister that freezes gadgets and slows attackers in an area.

name: Fenrir
ability_description: A deployable mine that triggers a fear effect to heavily restrict an attacker’s vision in its area.

name: Solis
ability_description: A sensor that detects enemy electronics through surfaces and can ping them for the team.

name: Azami
ability_description: Throws kunai that harden into bulletproof barriers to patch gaps, block lines of sight, and reshape sites.

name: Thorn
ability_description: A proximity trap that detonates after a short delay, dealing damage and forcing attackers to reposition.

name: Thunderbird
ability_description: A deployable healing station that can restore health and revive downed teammates and enemies in range.

name: Aruni
ability_description: An energy gate that detects intruders and burns them, denying entry and destroying gadgets that pass through.

name: Melusi
ability_description: A deployable gadget that slows nearby attackers and creates loud audio cues, helping defenders track pushes.

name: Oryx
ability_description: A high-speed dash that can knock down enemies, break soft walls, and lets Oryx climb up open hatches.

name: Wamai
ability_description: Deployable magnetic devices that catch attacker projectiles and detonate them safely away from the team.

name: Goyo
ability_description: Deployable shields with incendiary canisters that ignite and deny an area when triggered.

name: Warden
ability_description: Smart glasses that let Warden see through smoke and avoid or instantly recover from flash effects while standing still.

name: Mozzie
ability_description: Deployable pests that hijack attacker drones, giving Mozzie control of the drone while denying intel.

name: Kaid
ability_description: A throwable claw that electrifies reinforced walls, hatches, barbed wire, and deployable shields.

name: Clash
ability_description: An extendable electrified shield that slows and disrupts attackers while giving Clash protection and crowd control.

name: Maestro
ability_description: Bulletproof cameras that provide intel and can fire lasers to damage attackers and destroy gadgets.

name: Alibi
ability_description: Deployable holograms that bait attackers into revealing themselves when they shoot, melee, or pass through them.

name: Vigil
ability_description: A cloaking device that hides Vigil from cameras and drones for a limited time.

name: Ela
ability_description: Concussion traps that disorient attackers, create noise, and interrupt actions.

name: Lesion
ability_description: Invisible proximity mines that damage and slow attackers over time when triggered.

name: Mira
ability_description: Deployable one-way windows that let defenders see through reinforced walls while attackers see only black glass.

name: Echo
ability_description: Deployable drones that provide intel and can emit sonic bursts to disorient attackers.

name: Caveira
ability_description: A stealth ability that lets Caveira move almost silently, enabling ambushes and interrogations.

name: Valkyrie
ability_description: Deployable sticky cameras that provide broad intel and can be hidden around the map.

name: Frost
ability_description: Deployable bear traps that down attackers when triggered.

name: Mute
ability_description: Deployable jammers that block attacker electronics, including drones and hard-breaching gadgets.

name: Smoke
ability_description: Deployable gas canisters that create toxic clouds, deny access, and punish attackers in choke points.

name: Castle
ability_description: Reinforced barricades that can block doors and windows, forcing attackers to spend utility or time breaking through.

name: Pulse
ability_description: A handheld scanner that detects attacker heartbeats through surfaces for close-range intel.

name: Doc
ability_description: A healing pistol that restores health, revives teammates, and can self-heal.

name: Rook
ability_description: A deployable pack that gives teammates extra armor, helping them survive more damage and get revived more safely.

name: Jäger
ability_description: Deployable devices that intercept and destroy incoming projectiles before they detonate.

name: Bandit
ability_description: Electrified barbed wire that can also electrify reinforced walls and deployable shields to deny breaches.

name: Tachanka
ability_description: A mounted grenade launcher that fires incendiary rounds to deny areas and control choke points.

name: Kapkan
ability_description: Explosive traps placed on doorframes and windows that detonate when attackers pass through.
